---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working correctly
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Open the app
2. Go to '...'
3. Click on '...'
4. See error

## Expected behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour
What actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment
- **OS:** (e.g. Windows 11 23H2 / Ubuntu 24.04 / macOS 14.3)
- **App version:** (e.g. 1.0.0)
- **Display manager (Linux only):** (e.g. SDDM / LightDM / GDM)

## Additional context
Any other context about the problem (error messages, logs, etc.).
